title: Crunchy Beef Empanadas with Chinese Twist
description: A fusion dish that combines crunchy beef empanadas with a Chinese twist, perfect for a quick snack or light meal.
instructions: 1. In a pan, heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil over medium heat.
2. Add the ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces.
3. Add the soy sauce, oyster sauce, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper to the pan.
4. Stir to combine and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, preheat a deep frying pan or a deep fryer to 350°F (180°C).
6. When the oil is hot, add the empanadas and fry until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes on each side.
7. Remove the empanadas from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
8. Sprinkle the crunchy fried onions on top of the empanadas.
9. Serve the empanadas hot, garnished with additional crunchy fried onions if desired.
